taskPreset.title: Create Research Investigation Task
taskPreset.description: Queue a structured CodeRef research task with an output vault, optional references, optional project scope, and repository intake.

panel.projectHint: The research session will be created inside the selected project.
panel.taskNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to use the preset default title for this queued research session.
panel.vaultScopeHint: Choose one CodeRef output vault and optionally attach reference vaults in the same selector.
panel.vaultEmptyDescription: Register a CodeRef vault first, then return here to start a research session.
panel.vaultRequiredMessage: Select one CodeRef Vault as the output target before starting research.
panel.projectReferencesHint: Optionally attach other projects as read-only or editable context for this investigation.
panel.repositoryUrlsHint: Enter one repository URL per line. Blank lines are ignored and duplicates are removed before submission.
panel.directionHint: Be explicit about the investigation goal, expected evidence, and any cross-repo concerns.
panel.directionPlaceholder: Focus on how the research flow should migrate into the shared preset-task architecture, including backend validation, shared drawer UX, and cleanup risk.
panel.directionRequiredMessage: Enter a research direction before submitting.
